title: Coconut Cream Pudding
description: A rich and creamy Australian-style dessert made with coconut cream and pudding.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine the chilled coconut cream and pudding mix.
Mix well until the pudding mix is fully incorporated.
If desired, add the granulated sugar and mix until combined.
Beat in the large egg until well combined.
Add the vanilla extract if using and mix until combined.
Pour the mixture into individual serving cups or a large serving dish.
Refrigerate for at least 3 hours or until set.
Just before serving, garnish with shredded coconut.
